## Editing.validateAndParseCollection() function

Validate and parse collection source file. Combines parsing and validation in one step.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function validateAndParseCollection<T>(content: string, itemConverter: Converter<T>, format?: 'yaml' | 'json'): Result<ICollectionSourceFile<T>>;
```
